creator: voh.ron@gmail.com
text:
multimedia/php-pHash does not install

# uname -a
FreeBSD hostname 11.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Mon Oct 24 06:55:27 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# pkg version | grep libsndfile
libsndfile-1.0.27                  =

# pkg version | grep pHash
pHash-0.9.6_3                      =


===>  Building for php-pHash-0.9.6_1
--- pHash.lo ---
/bin/sh /usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/libtool --mode=compile c++  -I. -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php -DPHP_ATOM_INC -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/main -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php -I/usr/local/include/php -I/usr/local/include/php/main -I/usr/local/include/php/TSRM -I/usr/local/include/php/Zend -I/usr/local/include/php/ext -I/usr/local/include/php/ext/date/lib -I/usr/local/include  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H  -O2 -pipe -march=native -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing   -c /usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/pHash.cpp -o pHash.lo
mkdir .libs
 c++ -I. -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php -DPHP_ATOM_INC -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/main -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php -I/usr/local/include/php -I/usr/local/include/php/main -I/usr/local/include/php/TSRM -I/usr/local/include/php/Zend -I/usr/local/include/php/ext -I/usr/local/include/php/ext/date/lib -I/usr/local/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -pipe -march=native -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -c /usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/pHash.cpp  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/pHash.o
--- ./pHash.la ---
/bin/sh /usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/libtool --mode=link cc -DPHP_ATOM_INC -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/include -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/main -I/usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php -I/usr/local/include/php -I/usr/local/include/php/main -I/usr/local/include/php/TSRM -I/usr/local/include/php/Zend -I/usr/local/include/php/ext -I/usr/local/include/php/ext/date/lib -I/usr/local/include  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H  -O2 -pipe -march=native -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -fstack-protector -o ./pHash.la -export-dynamic -avoid-version -prefer-pic -module -rpath /usr/ports/multimedia/php-pHash/work/pHash-0.9.6/bindings/php/modules  pHash.lo -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -lpHash -lstdc++
grep: /usr/local/lib/libsndfile.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/local/lib/libsndfile.la: No such file or directory
libtool: link: `/usr/local/lib/libsndfile.la' is not a valid libtool archive
*** [./pHash.la] Error code 1
